race.comment: CRUISE TO RIO (3) flew home to score over the 1232m journey here most recently, with a 0.7L margin up her sleeve. She'd been inching toward that win and now looks to repeat the dose up in trip. That is the query, but she looks ready for it now and she'll be flying late. TOUSLED CROWN (8) stuck on well at Pinjarra last time out in a return to form. Yuill rides now in this easier event and another forward showing wouldn't surprise. CAPRICIOUS RULER (11) is better than we saw last time out in a stronger race and can bounce back to form. STATE OF FURY (7) can improve with a better barrier this time.
